examples: "A codfish," replied the voice, "only a codfish."
Have we been captained all this time by a codfish!
How about codfish with macaroni and cheese for dinner.
Her serves up a mean dish of bacalao - sliced codfish cooked in olive oil.
Still, codfish aren't about to become an endangered species, according to Sam Rauch, head of the NOAA's fisheries service.
